name: What do you want to forget?
I want to be a girl.
I want to use makeup too.
Letting you eat the people here alive.
Moko and Taki and Maru and Kina.
They all died because of you!
True, it sucks to be born that way.
And to get the power to shrink people.
But I suffered so much for it.
Let's put an end to this.
